scenarios.description: children() returns empty Elements when element has no child nodes (childNodeSize == 0 branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); // no children added

scenarios.description: children() returns single child element when one Element child present (childNodeSize > 0, single filter iteration)
children() filters out non-Element nodes among mixed childNodes (filter excludes TextNode)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendText("hello"); parent.appendElement("p");
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("div"); el.appendText("hello"); el.appendElement("p");

scenarios.description: children() returns cached children on second call without rebuilding (cachedChildren != null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element parent = new Element("div"); parent.appendElement("a"); // first call builds cache, second uses cache
scenarios.expectedResult: first call and second call both return Elements size 1 and same instance tagName
pseudocode: Elements first = el.children(); Elements second = el.children();
assert first.size() == 1; assert second.size() == 1; assert second.get(0).tagName().equals("a");
